meta.title: State Management Evolution: useState to Zustand
meta.excerpt: Scaling form state with persistence and type safety

props.text: Our multi-step form for requesting electrical services quotations started simple - a few useState hooks at the page level. But as we added validation, persisted state, user preferences, and wizard flow state, the component became unmaintainable. Props were drilled 5+ levels deep, state updates were scattered, and persistence logic was duplicated.

props.title: The Problem with Prop Drilling
props.body: When state is at the page level and needed at nested components, we pass it through every intermediate component. This creates tight coupling, makes components hard to move, and difficult to reuse.

props.text: Managing multi-step form state with useState became unwieldy as complexity grew. State was scattered, props were drilled, and there was no clear place for shared logic.

features.title: Prop Drilling
features.description: useState scattered across components. Props passed through 5+ levels with no semantic meaning.

features.title: No Persistence
features.description: User had to restart form after page reload. No localStorage integration for recovery.

features.title: Shared State Difficult
features.description: Sibling components couldn't share state. Had to lift state up 5 levels.

features.title: Hard to Debug
features.description: No devtools. When bugs happened, tracing state changes was manual and painful.

props.text: We migrated to Zustand, a lightweight state management library with built-in persistence and devtools support. Each form type got its own store with clear actions and selectors.

steps.title: Create Store
steps.description: Define Zustand store with state, actions, and persist middleware.

steps.title: Replace useState
steps.description: Remove prop drilling. Use custom hooks to access store everywhere.

steps.title: Add Persistence
steps.description: Enable localStorage sync so form data survives page reloads.

steps.title: Enable DevTools
steps.description: Integrate Redux DevTools for time-travel debugging.

steps.title: Test & Validate
steps.description: Verify all form flows work. Test persistence across sessions.

props.title: Key Takeaway
props.body: Use Zustand for form-level state management. It eliminates prop drilling, adds persistence for free, and provides excellent DevTools integration. Your components become simpler and more reusable.
